summary: EduNex AI is an educational website featuring an AI study assistant that can solve any academic problem, notes for all classes (school and university), a PYQ (Previous Year Questions) and sample papers section, and an academic tools section that supports adding more tools in the future.
architectural_notes: Academic tools section should be modular/extensible to allow adding new tools in the future

existing_features.title: Design and implement a cohesive visual theme for EduNex Aisa: a modern academic aesthetic using deep teal and amber accents, clean sans-serif typography, card-based layouts, and subtle gradients. Apply this consistently across all pages and components.
Create a main navigation structure with five top-level sections accessible from a persistent navbar: Home, AI Study Assistant, Notes, PYQ & Sample Papers, and Academic Tools.

Implement an AI Study Assistant section where users can type any academic question or problem into a chat-style interface. The backend should store conversation messages (question + answer pairs) per session. For now, return a placeholder/mock answer from the backend until a real AI integration is added.

Implement a Notes section where notes can be created, stored, browsed, and read. Notes must be categorized by level (School or University) and by class/grade or subject. Backend should persist all notes with fields: title, content, class/grade, subject, level (School/University), and creation date.

Implement a PYQ (Previous Year Questions) and Sample Papers section. Users can browse and filter papers by exam type, subject, class/grade, and year. Backend should persist entries with fields: title, type (PYQ or Sample Paper), subject, class/grade, year, and a file URL or text content.

Implement an Academic Tools section that displays a grid of tool cards. Each tool card has a name, icon/emoji, short description, and a launch button. The list of tools must be stored in the backend so new tools can be added in the future without code changes. Seed the backend with at least 3 initial placeholder tools (e.g., Unit Converter, Formula Reference, Citation Generator).

Create a Home/landing page for EduNex Aisa with a hero section (tagline, call-to-action buttons linking to each main section), a feature highlights row showing the four key sections, and a footer with the site name and tagline.
Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the frontend HTML page title (frontend/index.html).
Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the Navbar component (logo text, aria labels, and any other visible or hidden text).
Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the Footer component (branding text, copyright line, mission statement, and any other visible text).

Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' across all remaining frontend source files including Home.tsx, App.tsx, tailwind.config.js, index.css, and any other file that contains the old name.

new_feature_requests.summary: AI study assistant that can solve any academic/study problem
Notes section covering all classes for school and university
PYQ (Previous Year Questions) and sample papers section
Academic tools section with ability to add more tools in the future
Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the backend Motoko source file (backend/main.mo), including any comments or string literals that reference the old name.
